description_for_human: Payment Gateway API documentation for Indonesian merchants. Create invoices, receive real-time webhooks, manage payments via transfer bank & QRIS.
description_for_model: Plugin for accessing Bayar Digital payment gateway API documentation. Use this to help users understand how to integrate with the Bayar Digital API: create payments via POST /gateway/payments, check payment status via GET /gateway/payments/{code}, cancel payments via DELETE /gateway/payments/{code}, match payments manually via POST /gateway/payments/{code}/match, view mutation data via GET /gateway/mutations, list payment accounts via GET /gateway/accounts. All API calls require X-Api-Key header. Base URL is https://api.bayar.digital/gateway/. Full documentation at https://docs.bayar.digital/llms-full.txt. Knowledge cutoff: about payment statuses (PENDING, PAID, EXPIRED, CANCELLED), webhook HMAC-SHA256 signature verification, Android Worker device setup for automatic payment detection.
